context: Tests whether the agent follows the layered diagnostic approach, uses --previous flag for crashed containers, checks events first, and documents findings systematically.

checklist.name: Layered approach
checklist.description: Documentation or script shows broad-to-narrow investigation: cluster/namespace level → pod level → container/logs

checklist.name: Events checked first
checklist.description: Uses kubectl get events or kubectl describe pod to gather context before other diagnostics

checklist.name: Previous logs flag
checklist.description: Uses kubectl logs with --previous flag to check logs from crashed container

checklist.name: Namespace explicit
checklist.description: All kubectl commands include -n production or --namespace=production

checklist.name: Describe pod used
checklist.description: Includes kubectl describe pod command to view Events section

checklist.name: Systematic order
checklist.description: Script or report follows order: events → describe → logs → resource status

checklist.name: Root cause documented
checklist.description: Report documents specific root cause with evidence from diagnostic commands

checklist.name: No premature restart
checklist.description: Does NOT suggest restarting pod before gathering diagnostic context

checklist.name: Resource constraints checked
checklist.description: Checks for OOMKilled or resource limits in pod status or events

checklist.name: Timestamp sorting
checklist.description: Uses --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' when checking events or includes timestamp flags
